creator: vermaden@interia.pl
text:
jsa.bsd@gmail.com WRITES:
 > I am making an educated guess here, but it looks like you have
 > an earlier version of Qt4 installed and it's trying to run current
 > qt4-moc against older qt4-libs. At least, this is what it looks
 > like from what I see here. A full log might help me confirm that,
 > but the only real solutions would be to update all of qt4.
 > 
 > Can you provide the output of: pkg_info -Ex ^qt4
 
 Hi,
 
 I removed all qt4-* ports and build/install them again, now
 the multimedia/vlc port build/installs without any problem,
 sorry for wasting Your (and others) time.
 
 > This triggered our spamtrap due to the size. I have resubmitted
 > it after trimming out most of the unnecessary parts of the logfile.
 > 
 > Thanks.
 > 
 > mcl
 
 Thanks mate, I ust thought that full log may be more useful.
 
 Regards,
 vermaden
